prompt: Classify the following files into the correct architecture layer: project root ARCHITECTURE.md, module-level auth.arch.md, and component-level UserRepository.arch.md

assertions.name: classifies_l0_correctly
assertions.description: ARCHITECTURE.md at root should be classified as L0 (project level)

assertions.name: classifies_l1_correctly
assertions.description: Module-level arch.md should be classified as L1

assertions.name: classifies_l2_correctly
assertions.description: Component-level arch.md should be classified as L2

assertions.name: explains_layer_hierarchy
assertions.description: Should explain the L0/L1/L2 hierarchy relationship
